englishDefinitions: A popular toy oven, originally made for children, that can bake small cakes or treats.
A cultural reference to a simple toy kitchen appliance used in pretend or beginner baking.
persianTranslation: نوعی فر کوچک اسباب‌بازی برای کودکان
examples: She loved making tiny cakes in her Easy-Bake Oven when she was a child.
The dessert looked like it came from an Easy-Bake Oven, but it tasted great.
He bought his niece an Easy-Bake Oven for her birthday.
